basic_details.job_title: Central University of Odisha Guest Faculty Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
basic_details.short_information: Central University of Odisha Guest Faculty Notification 2026 has been released on 03 July 2026 on the official website cuo.ac.in. A total of 14 vacancies have been announced through the Central University of Odisha Guest Faculty Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: Master's degree with 55% marks in relevant subject, NET/Ph.D. or equivalent as per UGC Regulations 2018
qualification.details: Botany: A Master's degree with 55% marks (or an equivalent grade in a point-scale wherever the grading system is followed) in a concerned/relevant/allied subject from an Indian University, or an equivalent degree from an accredited foreign University. Besides fulfilling the above qualifications, the candidates must have cleared the National Eligibility Test (NET) conducted by the UGC or the CSIR, or Ph.D. or a similar test like SLET/SET accredited by the UGC. Zoology: A Master's degree with 55% marks (or an equivalent grade in a point-scale wherever the grading system is followed) in M.Sc. Zoology/ Bioscience/ Animal Science/Life Science (Zoology/Animal Science specialization)/ Biochemistry/ Biotechnology/ Microbiology/ Molecular and Human Genetics/ Molecular Biology/ Genetic Engineering/ Structural Biology/ Bioinformatics/ Fishery Sciences/ Biodiversity Conservation (with specialization in animal sciences) and Marine Sciences/Marine Biology (with specialization in animal sciences) and Environmental Sciences from an Indian University, or an equivalent degree from an accredited foreign University. Besides fulfilling the above qualifications, the candidates must have cleared the National Eligibility Test (NET) conducted by the UGC or the CSIR or Ph.D or a similar test like SLET/SET accredited by the UGC. Logistics & Supply Chain Management: A Master's degree with 55% marks (or an equivalent grade on a point scale wherever the grading system is followed) in the relevant specialization from an Indian University, or an equivalent degree from an accredited foreign University. Besides fulfilling the above qualification, the candidate must have cleared the National Eligibility Test (NET) conducted by the UGC or the CSIR, or possess a Ph.D. in accordance with UGC Regulations, or have qualified SLET/SET accredited by the UGC.

salary_details.botany: Rs. 1500/- per lecture subject to maximum of Rs. 50,000/- per month
salary_details.zoology: Rs. 1500/- per lecture subject to maximum of Rs. 50,000/- per month
salary_details.logistics & supply chain management: Rs. 1500/- per lecture subject to maximum of Rs. 50,000/- per month

content_sections.heading: Central University of Odisha Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the Central University of Odisha Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. content_sections.heading: Central University of Odisha Recruitment 2026 - Vacancy Details
Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Botany: A Master's degree with 55% marks (or an equivalent grade in a point-scale wherever the grading system is followed) in a concerned/relevant/allied subject from an Indian University, or an equivalent degree from an accredited foreign University. Besides fulfilling the above qualifications, the candidates must have cleared the National Eligibility Test (NET) conducted by the UGC or the CSIR, or Ph.D. or a similar test like SLET/SET accredited by the UGC. Zoology: A Master's degree with 55% marks (or an equivalent grade in a point-scale wherever the grading system is followed) in M.Sc. Zoology/ Bioscience/ Animal Science/Life Science (Zoology/Animal Science specialization)/ Biochemistry/ Biotechnology/ Microbiology/ Molecular and Human Genetics/ Molecular Biology/ Genetic Engineering/ Structural Biology/ Bioinformatics/ Fishery Sciences/ Biodiversity Conservation (with specialization in animal sciences) and Marine Sciences/Marine Biology (with specialization in animal sciences) and Environmental Sciences from an Indian University, or an equivalent degree from an accredited foreign University. Besides fulfilling the above qualifications, the candidates must have cleared the National Eligibility Test (NET) conducted by the UGC or the CSIR or Ph.D or a similar test like SLET/SET accredited by the UGC. Logistics & Supply Chain Management: A Master's degree with 55% marks (or an equivalent grade on a point scale wherever the grading system is followed) in the relevant specialization from an Indian University, or an equivalent degree from an accredited foreign University. Besides fulfilling the above qualification, the candidate must have cleared the National Eligibility Test (NET) conducted by the UGC or the CSIR, or possess a Ph.D. in accordance with UGC Regulations, or have qualified SLET/SET accredited by the UGC.

rows.event: Walk-in Interview Date for Logistics & Supply Chain Management

content_sections.heading: Walk-In Procedure
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to attend the walk-in interview for Central University of Odisha Various Posts Recruitment 2026 should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before attending the interview. Candidates must report at the venue as per the reporting time mentioned in the notification. Carry all original documents along with one set of self-attested photocopies such as ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if required), and category certificate (if applicable). Bring the duly filled application form if required in the notification. Verify eligibility criteria before attending the interview. Candidates are advised to reach the venue well in advance to complete registration formalities. Keep extra passport-size photographs for submission if required.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for Guest Faculty posts at Central University of Odisha?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for Guest Faculty posts at Central University of Odisha is scheduled for 13 July 2026 for all mentioned disciplines.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Guest Faculty position?
faq.answer: There are a total of 14 vacancies for the Guest Faculty position across various departments at the Central University of Odisha.

faq.question: Q3. What is the minimum educational qualification required for the Guest Faculty posts?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Master's degree with 55% marks in the relevant subject, along with NET/Ph.D. or equivalent as per UGC Regulations 2018.

faq.question: Q4. Is there any application fee for the Guest Faculty recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary structure for the Guest Faculty positions?
faq.answer: The salary is Rs. 1500/- per lecture, with a maximum monthly earning of Rs. 50,000/-.

faq.question: Q6. What documents should candidates carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates must carry all original documents and one set of self-attested photocopies, including ID proof, educational certificates, and experience certificates if applicable.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Guest Faculty recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Guest Faculty positions will be based on an Interview.

faq.question: Q8. Where is the walk-in interview scheduled to be held?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be held at the Central University of Odisha office in Koraput, Odisha.

faq.question: Q9. What is the job type for these Guest Faculty positions?
faq.answer: The Guest Faculty positions are on a contractual basis.

faq.question: Q10. Can candidates from outside Odisha apply for these posts?
faq.answer: The notification does not specify any domicile restrictions, so candidates from outside Odisha may apply if they meet the eligibility criteria.
